name: Episodic Memory Sync — Remove PM Gate
goal: Remove professional mode gate from episodic-memory-sync.sh so conversation indexing runs for all sessions

tasks.name: Remove PM gate from hook
tasks.description: Delete lines 18-35 (PM gate comment, INPUT/init_session_id, session pre-flight, PROF_MODE check) from worker/hooks/episodic-memory-sync.sh

steps.description: Delete lines 18-35 from worker/hooks/episodic-memory-sync.sh using Edit tool with exact old_string match
steps.expected: Lines 18-35 removed; run_hook line flows directly to singleton check

tasks.name: Add deploy-hooks Makefile target and deploy
tasks.description: Add PHONY + variables + deploy-hooks target to Makefile, run make deploy-hooks, verify both locations match source, stage all plan files

steps.description: Edit Makefile: extend .PHONY line and add PLUGIN_CACHE_HOOK_DIR, STABLE_HOOK_DIR variables and deploy-hooks target
Run make deploy-hooks to copy hook to both deployed locations
steps.expected: Two cp commands execute and 'Deployed episodic-memory-sync.sh to plugin cache and stable hooks dir' printed

steps.description: Verify both deployed files match source
steps.command: diff worker/hooks/episodic-memory-sync.sh ~/.claude/plugins/cache/ironclaude/ironclaude/1.0.8/hooks/episodic-memory-sync.sh && diff worker/hooks/episodic-memory-sync.sh ~/.claude/ironclaude-hooks/episodic-memory-sync.sh && echo 'Both locations match source'
steps.expected: Both locations match source (no diff output)

steps.description: Stage Makefile and all plan docs
